title: Collection of segfault fixes encountered in sv-tests
body:
This is a collection of small fixes for segfaults that occurred when running circt-verilog on inputs from the sv-tests suite. Most of these were related to missing guards to prevent transformation of recursive ops, and missing error checks/propagation in the Verilog frontend. Claude turned out to be very good at triaging and fixing these, with some oversight and review.

I'll land this as a rebase instead of a squash, to preserve the distinct commits.
